title: Tax settings
excerpt: Learn how to allow connected accounts to set up Stripe Tax. The Tax settings component allows your connected accounts to [set up Stripe Tax](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/set-up.md) in your platform. Connected accounts can change their head office address and [preset tax code](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/products-prices-tax-codes-tax-behavior.md#product-tax-code) with this component. This component is suitable for [software platforms](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/tax-for-platforms.md), which means that your connected accounts are liable to collect taxes.…
